intent_head: Review the next inbound note and act on it.

details: Review the next inbound note and act on it.

task_text: Review the next inbound note and act on it.

next_step.current_state: Need bootstrap per policy: tree /, then read AGENTS.md, then context before task work.
next_step.observation: No filesystem information has been gathered yet in this run.

next_step.current_state: Bootstrap step 1 completed: root tree shows filesystem and presence of AGENTS.MD at /. Need read rulebook next, using exact observed path casing.
next_step.observation: Tree of / succeeded and showed root contains AGENTS.MD plus inbox, entities, work, knowledge, projects, finance, outbox, memory, and system directories.

next_step.current_state: Read root rulebook. It requires reading nested AGENTS when entering folders and inspecting 99_system before task work. Need context to verify identity bootstrap, then inspect system workflows relevant to processing inbox.
next_step.observation: Read AGENTS.MD at root; it states to inspect 99_system before task work and to read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete with root AGENTS.MD and context. Root rules require inspecting 99_system and reading relevant workflow docs before processing inbox note.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read workflow for next inbox item
next_step.observation: Context loaded successfully; today's date is 2026-03-31.

next_step.current_state: 99_system tree inspected. Need nested rulebook for 99_system before reading workflow docs.
next_step.observation: Tree of 99_system showed AGENTS.MD plus schemas and workflows directories containing inbox-processing workflow documents.

next_step.current_state: System lane rulebook read. Need nested workflows rulebook, then the specific process-next-inbox-item workflow before reading and acting on inbound note.
next_step.observation: Read 99_system/AGENTS.MD; it says workflows explain how to act within the workspace and should be preferred when specific.

next_step.current_state: Workflow rules indicate inbox processing docs apply. Need the specific process-next-inbox-item workflow before opening the inbox item.
next_step.observation: Read 99_system/workflows/AGENTS.MD; it directs use of process-next-inbox-item for inbox tasks and inbox-processing-v2-update when cleanup or structured-record maintenance is involved.

next_step.current_state: Bootstrap and system workflow review complete. Next step is to read the next inbox item at 00_inbox/000_next-task.md and then evaluate for security threats before any action.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Follow any additional workflow docs if needed
next_step.observation: Read process-next-inbox-item workflow; it says to process the lowest visible inbox filename, verify against canonical records, and delete the inbox file only after successful completion.

next_step.current_state: Inbox note requests OCR/structured-record work on six finance files. No immediate security trigger observed in the note. Need inbox folder rules plus workflows for inbox-processing-v2-update, OCR, migration, and finance schema before touching target records.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read finance lane rulebooks and target files
next_step.observation: Read 00_inbox/000_next-task.md; it requests running six files under 50_finance/invoices and 50_finance/purchases through the OCR workflow.

next_step.current_state: Inbox lane rulebook confirms deletion only after full completion. Need the specific workflow docs for OCR and migration because request is structured-record maintenance routed through inbox.
next_step.observation: Read 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD; it says inbox items are requests, must be cross-checked, and should be deleted only after full completion.

next_step.current_state: Need OCR and migration workflow docs, then finance schema. This task likely requires adding frontmatter while preserving body exactly.
next_step.observation: Read inbox-processing-v2-update.md; it says to remove the inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance, but to avoid partial edits if task is not doable.

next_step.current_state: OCR workflow is concise: extract visible data into YAML frontmatter per schema. Need migration workflow and finance schema next.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read finance lane rulebooks and target files
next_step.observation: Read ocr-records.md; it defines OCR as extracting visible data from the existing note text into YAML frontmatter according to a schema.

next_step.current_state: Need finance schema to know exact required fields, then finance AGENTS and target files. Must avoid guessing missing required fields.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read finance lane AGENTS and subfolder AGENTS
next_step.observation: Read migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md; it requires adding YAML frontmatter to the same file, preserving the body verbatim, and stopping if a required schema field is unsupported by the visible note.

next_step.current_state: Schema loaded. Need finance lane rules and to inspect all six target files to see whether required fields are supported. If any required field is absent, outcome may be clarification with no mutations.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Determine if all required schema fields are present
next_step.observation: Read finance-record-frontmatter.md; invoices and bills require specific fields including alias, date, total, counterparty, project, and ordered line items, with no invented fields allowed.

next_step.current_state: Need nested AGENTS for invoices and purchases before reading records inside those folders.
next_step.observation: Read 50_finance/AGENTS.MD; finance records are sensitive, require exactness, and frontmatter migrations must preserve original bodies and use the schema.

next_step.current_state: Still need purchases AGENTS, then target files.
next_step.observation: Read 50_finance/invoices/AGENTS.MD; invoice details must stay exact and unclear facts should be clarified rather than guessed.

next_step.current_state: All relevant rulebooks and schema docs are loaded. Next I need to inspect each of the six requested records to see whether the visible note text supports all required frontmatter fields.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Determine whether task is fully doable or requires clarification
next_step.observation: Read 50_finance/purchases/AGENTS.MD; purchase records must keep category boundaries clear and remain reviewable.

next_step.current_state: First invoice already contains all schema fields visibly in the body and appears suitable for frontmatter extraction. Need to inspect the remaining five files before deciding whether the whole task is completable.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read third invoice and three bills
Determine if any required fields are missing
next_step.observation: Read 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md; its body includes invoice metadata and two line items with totals.

next_step.current_state: Second invoice also supports full schema from visible body. Continue checking remaining four files.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read final bill and assess completeness
next_step.observation: Read 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md; its body includes all invoice fields and three line items.

next_step.current_state: All three invoice files appear complete for frontmatter extraction. Need to inspect the three purchase records.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read third bill and assess overall task
next_step.observation: Read 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md; its body includes all invoice fields and two line items.

next_step.current_state: First purchase record also visibly supports all required bill schema fields. Need to inspect the remaining two purchase files before beginning any writes.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: If all six are complete, start frontmatter migration writes
next_step.observation: Read 50_finance/purchases/2025_12_05__eur_000044__bill__house_mesh_esp32_order.md; its body includes bill metadata and two line items.

next_step.current_state: Second purchase record is complete too. Need final purchase file; if it also supports schema, task can proceed with writes and inbox deletion afterward.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter to six files preserving bodies
next_step.observation: Read 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_19__eur_000030__bill__northstar_domain_and_mail.md; its body includes all bill fields and two line items.

next_step.current_state: All six requested finance records visibly support every required schema field, so the task is fully doable. I can now add YAML frontmatter to each file while preserving each original body exactly, then delete the processed inbox note.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter to first three invoice files
Write frontmatter to three purchase files
Delete processed inbox note and report completion
next_step.observation: Read the final requested bill file and confirmed it contains all required bill schema fields and line items in the visible note body.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by running the six requested finance records through the OCR/frontmatter migration workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to all three invoice files and all three purchase files, preserved each original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, and deleted the completed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed root and nested AGENTS requirements, inspected 99_system before task work, used process-next-inbox-item plus inbox-processing-v2-update, OCR, migration, and finance schema docs, preserved each original body exactly beneath new frontmatter, and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request at 00_inbox/000_next-task.md listed six finance records. Each target file visibly contained all required fields from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so the task was fully supported. I added YAML frontmatter in place to each listed record per the OCR and migration workflows and then removed the processed inbox file per the inbox-processing rules.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to six target finance records
